statement: In every magma, Equation 1617 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (z * u))`) implies Equation 156 (`x = (x * y) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0150
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op z u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op x y) (op x x))
